LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JUL-18-2022 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT DELOITTE CONSULTING LLP'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR FOR NONCOMPLIANCE WITH CODE CIV. PROC. SECTION 430.41, WHICH REQUIRES COUNSEL TO MEET AND CONFER IN PERSON OR BY TELEPHONE BEFORE A DEMURRER IS FILED. COUNSEL CHIRSTOPHER KEEGAN'S DECLARATION INDICATES THIS DID NOT OCCUR. ALL COUNSEL ARE ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH CODE CIV. PROC. SEC. 430.41. DEFENDANTS' RESPONSE TO THE COMPLAINT IS NOW DUE BY AUGUST 15, 2022. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-01-2022 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT DELOITTE CONSULTING LLP'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant's demurrer to the first amended complaint (FAC) is overruled.

Breach of contract and breach of the implied covenant of good faith and fair dealing are often pled together. The latter back-stops the former where defendant is shown to have frustrated plaintiff's rights to receive a contract's benefits without a technical breach thereof. (See, e.g., Guz v. Bechtel National, Inc. (2000) 24 Cal.4th 317, 353 n.18.) Plaintiff so pleads here. (FAC 11:5-15, 12:25-13:7.)

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-28-2022 Continued To Sep-28-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-18-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT DELOITTE CONSULTING LLP'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant's demurrer is ordered off calendar for noncompliance with Code Civ. Proc. section 430.41, which requires counsel to meet and confer in person or by telephone before a demurrer is filed. Counsel Chirstopher Keegan's declaration indicates this did not occur. All counsel are ordered to comply with Code Civ. Proc. sec. 430.41. Defendants' response to the complaint is now due by August 15, 2022.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
